title: Auto Cycle Remote Control
description:
Auto Cycle Remote Control

Auto Mode with Remote Control

To run in auto cycle with remote control

The
	 host device (e.g. PLC) should wait for the AutoMode and Ready remote
	 output to turn on before issuing remote commands.

Now
	 the remote input commands will be accepted.

To monitor remote operation from the Epson RC+ 8.0 Operator Window

Set
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 Start Up Mode to "Auto". For details, refer to Start Mode.

The
	 PC should also be configured to automatically log into Windows and
	 start Epson RC+ 8.0 at Windows start. Refer to 4.2.7 Auto Start.
